mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wheelchair_rentals ( wheelchair_type, start_date, expect_date, customer_name, customer_tel, remarks ) VALUES ( #{wheelchairType}, #{startDate}, #{expectDate}, #{customerName}, #{customerTel}, #{remarks} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wheelchair_rentals SET payment = #{payment}, end_date = #{endDate} WHERE rental_id = #{rentalId}
mapper.select:
SELECT rental_id, start_date, expect_date, end_date, customer_name, customer_tel, wheelchair_type, remarks, payment FROM wheelchair_rentals WHERE 1=1
AND expect_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
AND customer_name like concat('%',#{customerName},'%')
AND customer_tel like concat('%',#{customerTel},'%')

SELECT rental_id, start_date, expect_date, end_date, customer_name, customer_tel, wheelchair_type, remarks, payment FROM wheelchair_rentals WHERE (payment is null OR payment = '')
AND DATE(expect_date) <= now()
